title: TraderDecision
description: Canonical decision schema emitted by each model every cycle. Frozen at Phase 0 — do not modify once Phase 1 begins (IFACE-03).

action.description: Trade action to execute. 'hold' means no position change this cycle.

market.description: Perpetual market to trade. Required for open/close/adjust; omit on hold.

side.description: Direction. Required for open/adjust; omit on close and hold.

sizeUsd.description: Notional position size in USD (post-leverage). 0 on hold or close.

leverage.description: Leverage multiplier. Hard cap: 3x (CLAUDE.md constraint). 1 on hold.

rationale.description: Step-by-step reasoning. Stored verbatim in the journal for verifier replay.

confidence.description: Model's self-assessed confidence in this decision (0 = no conviction, 1 = maximum).

expectedHoldingPeriod.description: Expected holding duration: short (<4h), medium (4-24h), long (>24h).

$comment: VALIDATION VARIANT — additionalProperties:true for forward-compat (D-08). Extra fields are stored verbatim in the journal but ignored for trade execution. See schema.py:strict_provider_schema() for the provider-strict variant. sl/tp fields are DEFERRED (D-06).
